exercises.hindiScript: हमारे पास एक बड़ा घर था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The company had a large team.

exercises.audioScript: They had a lot of money.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They had a lot of money.
exercises.answer: They had a lot of money.

exercises.hindiScript: उसके पास एक अच्छा बॉस था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: मेरे पास एक पुरानी किताब थी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.audioScript: The company had a large team.
exercises.hindiScript: कंपनी के पास एक बड़ी टीम थी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They had a lot of money.
The company had a large team.
exercises.answer: The company had a large team.

exercises.hindiScript: बच्चे के पास बहुत खिलौने थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: उसके पास एक अच्छा विचार था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The team had completed the project.

exercises.hindiScript: मेरे पास कोई समस्या नहीं थी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The company had a large team.
I had watched this film before.

dictationPassage.text: We had a big house. They had a lot of money. He had a good boss. I had an old book. The company had a large team.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: हमारे पास एक बड़ा घर था। उनके पास बहुत पैसे थे। उसके पास एक अच्छा बॉस था। मेरे पास एक पुरानी किताब थी। कंपनी के पास एक बड़ी टीम थी।
